function.rulebook_notes: Completed required identity bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), inspected 99_system before task work, read nested AGENTS.MD in entered folders, and used exact auditable finance records.
function.outcome_justification: Exact phrase searches identified three invoices containing 'workflow mapping and intake audit'. Reading those files showed issued_on dates 2025-12-18, 2026-01-19, and 2026-03-20. Applying 'since beginning March 2026' (>=2026-03-01), only the 2026-03-20 invoice qualifies, with line_eur 420 for that service item.
